goal: Fix the bug in stats.py where the mean function incorrectly calculates the average by dividing by (len(numbers) + 1) instead of len(numbers), causing all three statistical functions to fail their tests.
scope: stats.py: Fix the mean() function calculation
Verify all tests in test_stats.py pass after the fix
out_of_scope: Refactoring the code beyond the bug fix

acceptance_criteria.check: Does the mean function now divide by len(numbers) instead of len(numbers) + 1?
